segments.text: Up tilt to control the situation, then Monkey Flip when that shield gets tight
segments.original_text: 展開 上強で狙っていく ガード固まるところに対してはモンキーフリップ

segments.text: Spacing with bananas while reading what the opponent does
segments.original_text: バナナを置きつつ相手の様子を見る

segments.text: Trading in the banana spacing, Monkey Flip
segments.original_text: バナナを挟んだやり合い モンキーフリップ

full_text: Up tilt to control the situation, then Monkey Flip when that shield gets tight Spacing with bananas while reading what the opponent does Trading in the banana spacing, Monkey Flip
